title: MP: Facebook lover bludgeons woman to death over marriage pressure
content: A young woman's decomposed body was discovered in a deserted house in Govari village, leading to the arrest of Chandrabhan Rathore. The accused confessed to murdering 24-year-old Kajal Puri on February 17 after she pressured him for marriage, following a relationship initiated on Facebook. Police recovered crucial evidence, including the victim's phone and the motorcycle used in the crime.

title: LPG crisis: Centre pushes states to fast-track switch to PNG amid Hormuz disruption
content: Escalating Middle East tensions are impacting Indian households and businesses reliant on LPG imports. To counter supply disruptions, the government is urging a swift shift to Piped Natural Gas (PNG), fast-tracking approvals and waiving charges for pipeline infrastructure. This initiative aims to ease the strain on LPG supplies, with hospitality and industrial sectors already facing significant challenges.

title: 'Two words' at the centre of Microsoft's dispute with Amazon & OpenAI in a $50 bn deal
content: Microsoft is threatening legal action against Amazon and OpenAI over a cloud deal that could violate Microsoft's exclusive partnership with OpenAI. The dispute centers on whether OpenAI's new 'Frontier' product, running on Amazon's AWS, constitutes 'stateful' access, which Microsoft claims must be routed through its Azure cloud.

title: 3 kids among 9 killed in massive fire at residential building in Delhi's Palam
content: A devastating fire in southwest Delhi's Palam area claimed at least seven lives, including three children, on Wednesday morning. The blaze, which broke out near the Palam Metro Station, raged for nearly three hours, making rescue operations difficult. Reports indicated nine family members may have been trapped inside the building.

title: Dhoni to hand WK gloves to Samson, captaincy next? Kumble on CSK plan
content: Sanju Samson embarks on a new IPL chapter with Chennai Super Kings after a stellar T20 World Cup.  Anil Kumble highlights Samson's form, leadership potential, and regional connection as significant assets for CSK.  His arrival strengthens the squad and offers stability, potentially even taking over keeping duties from MS Dhoni.

title: Zerodha founder Nithin Kamath says I don't use internet banking apps; here's why
content: Zerodha CEO Nithin Kamath revealed he avoids banking apps due to their invasive permissions, questioning why they need access to SMS, contacts, and calls. He highlighted the Principle of Least Privilege, stating apps should only access necessary data. In contrast, Zerodha's Kite app requests zero permissions, a deliberate choice reflecting their 'do unto others' philosophy, fostering user trust.

title: Cuba President guarantees 'unbreakable resistance' after Trump's takeover claim
content: Cuban leader Miguel Diaz-Canel has proclaimed 'iron-clad determination' to stand firm against aggressive US posturing, referencing Donald Trump's latest comments on 'taking over Cuba.' This declaration comes amid a dire fuel and economic crisis for the island, made worse by US blockades on oil shipments.

title: LPG cylinder rate, petrol, diesel price today: Check city-wise list of latest prices
content: The ongoing US-Iran war has meant that shipments from the Middle East and in particular the Strait of Hormuz have been held up. India imports a major chunk of its LPG needs, and a substantial percentage of that comes from the Middle East.

title: What are AI Tokens? Incentive Nvidia CEO will offer engineers; worth half their salary
content: Nvidia's CEO proposes a new compensation strategy: an annual token budget equivalent to half an engineer's base salary, on top of their regular pay. This move acknowledges tokens as the new currency of AI work, where usage directly impacts productivity and costs. Companies are increasingly tracking token consumption, making compute access a key recruiting factor.

title: Caitlin Clark surprised by Angel Reese gesture during FIBA qualifier
content: Caitlin Clark and Angel Reese drew attention during Team USA’s win over Spain when Reese helped Clark up after a fall, highlighting teamwork. Reese led in rebounds, while Clark dominated with 58 points and 32 assists in the qualifiers. Team USA finished 5-0, with Clark’s playmaking and Reese’s presence key to their strong run.

title: Watch: Israeli strike in Beirut reduces building to rubble in seconds
content: An Israeli airstrike obliterated a residential building in Beirut early Wednesday, following intensified strikes across Lebanon. The early morning attack flattened the structure, sending a massive dust cloud billowing. This incident, part of wider targeted attacks, resulted in six deaths and twelve injuries, with authorities yet to confirm specific targets amidst ongoing Israeli operations.

title: A look at 'Haj Qasem' missile Iran used for the first time against Israel
content: The IRGC claimed the strikes targeted sites in Beit Shemesh, Tel Aviv and Jerusalem. It also said the barrage hit US military bases in the region, including facilities in Qatar, Kuwait, the United Arab Emirates and Iraq. The reported use of the missile comes as the Iran-Israel war enters its third week, with the conflict spilling across the Gulf, disrupting shipping lanes and drawing in multiple regional actors.

title: ‘Call me’: Lalit Modi reacts to Kavya Maran after Abrar Ahmed row
content: Abrar Ahmed's selection for The Hundred by Sunrisers Leeds has ignited a storm, drawing criticism from former IPL chairman Lalit Modi and sparking political debate.  Despite backlash and Sunil Gavaskar's remarks, the franchise and sources close to the player emphasise cricketing merit and focus on his career, highlighting the ongoing geopolitical tensions impacting sports.

title: ‘Cannot understand the sensitivity?’ Humpy breaks silence on Candidates call
content: Indian Grandmaster Koneru Humpy expressed safety concerns regarding the upcoming Candidates Tournament in Cyprus due to the West Asia conflict, leaving her participation undecided. While Humpy cited a drone attack as a reason for her hesitation, FIDE downplayed the risks, assuring that preparations are ongoing and the region remains stable.

title: US-Iran war: How the LPG cylinder has become the face of Middle East mayhem's impact on India
content: Global tensions in the Middle East are directly impacting Indian households, causing a severe LPG shortage.  Rising fuel costs and disrupted shipments have led to panic bookings, long queues, and black marketing, forcing businesses to adapt and highlighting India's heavy reliance on imports.  The situation is escalating, affecting daily life and livelihoods across the nation.

title: No charge on 60% seats, flyers with same PNR to sit together: DGCA's new rules
content: Airlines must now allocate at least 60% of seats free of charge, ensuring families and groups on the same PNR are seated together, preferably adjacently. This directive aims to address passenger grievances regarding seat selection fees and separation of travel companions. The DGCA also mandates transparent policies for sports equipment, musical instruments, and pets, alongside prominent display of passenger rights.

title: After harassment, 10-man gang follows Class X girl home, ransacks house, damages vehicles in TN
content: A gang of at least 10 men harassed a Class X girl returning from an exam in Tiruttani, then ransacked her home and damaged vehicles. Following the incident, over 100 villagers held a road blockade demanding arrests. Police have arrested five youths and are searching for the remaining five.

title: Watch: Canadian PM and Finland President discuss ‘Dhurandhar’ during jog in London
content: Finnish President Alexander Stubb and Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney were captured jogging in London's Hyde Park, discussing the Hindi blockbuster 'Dhurandhar'. Stubb revealed his Instagram popularity surge in India followed his mention of the film, which he described as portraying serious issues. The conversation highlighted the growing international reach of Indian cinema.

title: EV on charge & 10 LPG cylinders: Deadly chain reaction behind Indore house fire that killed 7
content: A devastating fire, ignited by an electric vehicle charging short circuit, claimed seven lives, including a child, in Indore. The blaze triggered gas cylinder explosions, collapsing a building. Electronic locks trapped residents, hindering escape and rescue efforts. Authorities are now forming a committee to establish EV charging safety protocols.

title: 'Disease in Indian cricket': Ashwin raises concerns over fan armies 'ecosystem'
content: Cricket icon Ravichandran Ashwin has voiced strong concerns about 'fan armies' on social media, labelling their influence a 'disease.' He believes these organized narratives, often focusing on individuals over team performance, are shifting focus away from the game itself. Ashwin shared his personal experience with criticism after analyzing Shubman Gill's dismissals, highlighting the shift towards a superstar-driven culture.

title: Hormuz chokehold forces oil reroute via Red Sea — but how long can this lifeline hold?
content: Middle East conflict escalates, disrupting global oil flow. Iran's Strait of Hormuz threats push crude to the Red Sea, but even this route faces danger. Iran warns of targeting US-linked facilities, raising fears of further supply disruptions and potential oil price spikes, impacting consumers worldwide.

title: Injuries hit IPL pace units: KKR, SRH, RCB face selection headaches
content: IPL franchises Kolkata Knight Riders, Sunrisers Hyderabad, and Royal Challengers Bengaluru face significant pace bowling concerns due to injuries. KKR's Harshit Rana and Matheesha Pathirana are sidelined, while SRH captain Pat Cummins' fitness is uncertain. RCB's Josh Hazlewood is also racing against time to recover, potentially impacting their bowling attack.

title: YouTuber Ms Rachel’s 1-year-old daughter’s advanced vocabulary sparks debate among parents
content: A recent Ms Rachel video featuring her daughter Susie's early speaking skills has ignited a social media discussion. Many parents shared their own struggles with their children's speech development. Ms Rachel later revealed her elder child experienced a speech delay. This has reminded parents that every child develops at their own pace, emphasizing patience and support.

title: Mumbai court rejects BMC mayor Ritu Tawde’s discharge plea in 2016 teacher assault case
content: A Mumbai sessions court has rejected the discharge plea of Mayor Ritu Tawde in a 2016 case involving the alleged assault of school teachers. The court found sufficient evidence, including victim and witness statements, to proceed with charges of using criminal force against public servants. The order allows the case to move towards trial.

title: Rafael Nadal’s uncle Toni questions Carlos Alcaraz mindset after Roger Federer remark
content: Carlos Alcaraz’s comment about feeling like he faces “Roger Federer every round” has sparked debate, with Toni Nadal strongly disagreeing. Nadal said opponents raise their level because Alcaraz is better, not because they target him. After losing to Daniil Medvedev at Indian Wells, Alcaraz now heads to the Miami Open, where a tough second-round match awaits.

title: 'Can’t go downstairs to hotel bar': MS Dhoni's 'Shisha man' secret revealed
content: Sam Billings revealed that former CSK captain MS Dhoni maintained a relaxed team atmosphere, even employing a “Shisha man” in his hotel room. While Billings praised Dhoni’s calm and inclusive nature, the revelation sparked debate. Former cricketer Manoj Tiwary earlier hinted such bonding sessions may have influenced team selection dynamics.

title: 'Found lying in pool of blood': 3-month-pregnant YouTuber murdered by husband
content: A 20-year-old pregnant YouTuber, Chittari Vaishnavi, was allegedly murdered by her husband, Gandam Hari, in Jagtial district. Vaishnavi, who had 50,000 subscribers, was found with multiple stab injuries. Police suspect dowry harassment and family disputes escalated tensions, leading to the fatal attack. Hari is currently absconding.

title: Why did US counterterrorism chief and MAGA loyalist Joe Kent turn against Trump?
content: A senior counterterrorism official, Joe Kent, resigned over President Trump's Iran policy, citing no imminent threat and pressure from Israel. Kent, a MAGA figure, warned against repeating past mistakes, drawing parallels to the Iraq war. His departure highlights dissent within the administration and the broader Republican base regarding foreign interventions.

title: AFCON shocker: Senegal stripped of title as Morocco crowned after final chaos
content: Senegal has been stripped of their Africa Cup of Nations title, with CAF declaring Morocco champions after a chaotic final. The decision stems from Senegal players walking off the pitch in protest, leading to a 3-0 forfeit ruling. Senegal has vowed to appeal the unprecedented verdict to the Court of Arbitration for Sport.

title: Assam polls: Congress MP quits party after 30 years, gets offer from Himanta to join BJP
content: Assam Congress MP Pradyut Bordoloi resigned from the party after nearly three decades, citing sadness and feeling sidelined. This move follows an invitation from Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma to join the BJP, with speculation he might contest the Dispur constituency. Bordoloi confirmed BJP's outreach but noted a lack of response from Congress leadership.

title: WNBA, union agree in principle to new CBA terms
content: After a prolonged labor battle, the WNBA and players' union have agreed in principle to a new collective bargaining agreement just 51 days before the league's 30th season is set to tip.

title: Venezuela outduels USA to capture 1st WBC title
content: Venezuela won the World Baseball Classic for the first time, rebounding from Bryce Harper's tying home run in the eighth inning to beat the United States 3-2 Tuesday night on Eugenio Suárez's go-ahead double in the ninth.

title: U.S. laments another WBC loss as star offense lags
content: Team USA, boasting one of the most talented rosters ever assembled, failed to live up to its billing Tuesday night and could only watch as Venezuela celebrated its first World Baseball Classic championship.

title: Mark saves day, sends Texas to NCAA first round
content: Tramon Mark hit a fadeaway jumper from just inside the 3-point line with 1.1 seconds left, and Texas survived a late rally to beat NC State 68-66 on Tuesday night in a First Four matchup.

title: NFLPA elects former OL Tretter as next director
content: The NFLPA has elected former union chief strategy officer and retired Cleveland Browns offensive lineman JC Tretter as its next executive director.

title: Howard checks last box with first NCAAT win
content: Howard held off a late surge from UMBC to earn the first NCAA tournament victory in program history, an 86-83 decision in the First Four on Tuesday night.

title: Morocco given AFCON title after Senegal 'forfeit'
content: Morocco was stunningly awarded the Africa Cup of Nations title on Tuesday by appeals judges who overturned Senegal's victory in a chaotic final in January.

title: Crosby: I was 'livid' when Ravens nixed trade
content: Raiders defensive end Maxx Crosby said he was "livid" and "confused" by the Ravens' decision to back out of a trade that would have sent him to Baltimore in exchange for two first-round picks due to medical concerns.

title: 🏀 Giant Killers: Identifying men's tourney upsets
content: Which double-digit seeds have the highest potential to advance to the second round? Here's what ESPN's BPI says.

content: ESPN's bracketologist shares what he really thinks about every team's chances in the NCAA tournament.

title: Kiper's new NFL mock draft: How free agency shook up first-round landing spots for top prospects
content: Team needs have shifted in free agency, so how will top prospects come off the board in Round 1? Mel Kiper Jr. projects the NFL draft's first 32 picks.

title: Barnwell: The Broncos are all-in, and the Dolphins are all-out ... but does either strategy make sense?
content: Denver traded its first-round pick to Miami for Jaylen Waddle. Are the Broncos legit Super Bowl contenders? Are the Dolphins rebuilding in a smart way?

title: PSG show Chelsea what it takes to be truly part of Europe's elite
content: Chelsea may be club world champions, but Tuesday's 3-0 defeat to PSG in the Champions League showed just how far off the pace the Blues really are.

title: As Premier League sides crumble around them, Arsenal keep cruising closer to a quadruple
content: Arsenal should feel the pressure as Premier League leaders. Instead, they look comfortable as a quadruple is in their sights.

content: We're following NFL free agency signings, trades, cuts, contract restructures and other moves as they happen.

content: The NBA seems closer than ever to adding two franchises. Here's what we know, including how an expansion draft could work.

content: A wild card or Pacific Division spot both remain possible. Plus, full playoff projections, draft lottery standings, more.

content: Will any of the wild cards make a run? Plus, full playoff projections, draft lottery standings, more.

content: Another record for Shohei Ohtani? A 40/40 season for Juan Soto? We hand out preseason Real or Not verdicts.

title: ESPN's final points-league mock draft for 2026
content: Check out the results of our final fantasy baseball head-to-head points mock draft of 2026, featuring round-by-round picks and a snapshot of the rosters of all 10 teams.

title: Fantasy guide to NFL offseason signings: Broncos acquire Waddle from Dolphins
content: Your one-stop shop for fantasy football reaction to all the key player movement via free agency and trades.

title: 'I salute every boxer out there' -- Lamar Jackson boxes in offseason workout
content: Jackson is looking to bounce back after a hamstring injury which saw him play in only 13 games last season.

title: In final window before World Cup, Pochettino's USMNT roster shows softened stance on club form
content: Mauricio Pochettino once demanded peak club performance from his USMNT players, but his March squad raises the question of whether that's negotiable.

title: Pickups: Look to Jazz, Trail Blazers for waiver-wire options
content: Every week in fantasy basketball, there are available players who can help fill holes in your roster. Here are the ones to add for the week ahead.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Juve join Arsenal in race for Goretzka
content: Manchester United have outlined their summer transfer targets, while another European giant has entered the race for out-of-contract midfielder Leon Goretzka.

title: 7 Dead After Short Circuit At Indore EV Charging Station Sparks Blast
content: A short circuit led to an explosion at the EV charging point, setting the vehicle on fire. The fire quickly escalated as it reached a stockpile of over a dozen LPG cylinders stored inside the house.

title: 3 Children Among 7 Killed In Fire At Building In Delhi's Palam
content: Six people, including three children, were killed after a fire broke out in a residential building in southwest Delhi's Palam area on Wednesday morning, officials said.

title: Mumbai Family Doesn't Want Son To Become Another Harish Rana
content: The Harish Rana judgment brought national focus to patients trapped between life and death. Today, the case of Anand Dixit in Mumbai is raising similar questions, as he remains in a vegetative state more than two years after a devastating accident.

title: Man Brings Foetus In Courtroom In 200 Crores Case Against Maruti Suzuki
content: The petitioner, Dayashankar Pandey, had approached the High Court alleging that he had exposed a massive embezzlement of over Rs 200 crore involving Maruti Suzuki and that, as a result, he and his family were subjected to repeated attacks.

title: Centre's Push To Expand PNG Network As Iran War Raises LPG Supply Concerns
content: Amid energy security concerns stemming from the war in the Middle East, the Centre has launched measures to expand the Piped Natural Gas (PNG) network in the country.

title: Bengaluru Woman Tried To "Courier" Father In Sack For Reel. This Happened Next
content: Despite being caught, the family allegedly argued with the employees, insisting that the "parcel" be accepted since they had come all the way and "made the effort".

title: 'Will Work Together For Restoration Of Peace': PM Modi Speaks To UAE President
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday spoke to UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, discussed with him the current situation in West Asia and agreed on ensuring safe and free navigation through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: 'Martyrs Make Iran Stronger': Larijani's Message To US, Israel Before Death
content: Days before his assassination, Ali Larijani, the late secretary of Iran's Supreme National Security Council, had warned the US and Israel that killing Iranian leaders would only strengthen the country.

title: TVK Leader Apologises To Rajinikanth After "DMK Threat" Comment Sparks Row
content: In a significant climbdown ahead of the Tamil Nadu elections, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) General Secretary (Campaigns) Aadhav Arjuna on Wednesday apologised to superstar Rajinikanth for his controversial remarks

title: Sensex Today, Stock Market LIVE Updates: Sensex, Nifty Open In Green For 3rd Straight Day
content: Stock Market Live Updates Sensex Today: India VIX cools 13 per cent in two days. However, it is still well above pre-Iran war levels.

title: Will Markets Open On Gudi Padwa, Eid, Navratri 2026? Full Holiday List Here
content: Stock MarketHolidays March 2026: The Indian stock exchanges, National Stock Exchange and Bombay Stock Exchange, will remain open between March 19 and March 21, 2026.

title: "Fly To India For Free": US' Taj Mahal Post, $2,600 For 'Illegal Aliens'
content: The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) said the programme will waive certain penalties, including fines typically imposed for failing to depart the US after a removal order.

title: Nearly 90 Ships Cross Strait Of Hormuz As Iran Exports Millions Of Barrels Of Oil Despite War
content: About 90 ships including oil tankers have crossed the Strait of Hormuz since the outset of the war with Iran and it is still exporting millions of barrels of oil at a time when the waterway has been effectively closed, data shows.

title: Iran Crisis: After Larijani Killing, Who Else In Tehran Can The US Talk To?
content: Israel's killing of Ali Larijani, a veteran Iranian politician known for his pragmatism, leaves the Islamic Republic's wartime leadership largely in the hands of hardliners who may be less likely to seek a diplomatic pathway.

title: US Hits Iran Missiles Near Hormuz With 2,200 kg 'Bunker Buster' Bombs
content: In the first major action to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, the US military has said it had hit Iranian missile sites near the critical waterway with some of the most powerful bombs in the American arsenal.

title: Iran's Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant Hit In Israeli Strikes, Says UN Watchdog
content: The UN nuclear watchdog said Wednesday that Iranian authorities had reported projectile impact at the country's only operational nuclear power plant that caused no damage.

title: Iran Says Its Defence Won't Fall After Ali Larijani's Killing. Here's Why
content: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has said that the killing of top Iranian officials, including security chief Ali Larijani, will not be a setback for the government in Tehran.

title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran Vows 'Decisive' Retaliation, Launches Missiles At Israel After Ali Larijani's Death
content: US-Israel-Iran War News LIVE Updates: The war in the Middle East broke out when the US and Israel attacked Iran on February 28.

title: At Least 6 Killed In Israel Strikes On Central Beirut, Says Lebanon
content: Lebanon said Israel struck central Beirut early Wednesday without warning, killing at least six people, as the Israeli military announced it was targeting the country's south.

title: Asked men to talk softly, 70-year-old man bludgeoned to death in Gurgaon
content: Samad Hoque is a crime reporter with The Times of India, with a keen interest in the intersections of politics and public life. He has previously worked for The Tribune newspaper in Delhi. Read More

title: 22 Indian vessels still stuck in Strait of Hormuz
content: around 3 lakh tonnes of LPG loaded in six Indian-flagged ships is currently stranded in the Strait of Hormuz . at present, there are 22 Indian vessels in the strait, including the six LPG ships, an LNG tanker, four vessels with crude oil, one loaded with chemical and products .

content: Addressing the Upper House on the occasion of the biennial farewell, PM Modi said such moments naturally dissolve partisan divides

title: 2016 teachers' assault case: Court rejects discharge plea of Mumbai Mayor Ritu Tawde
content: According to the prosecution, the conflict erupted over the "sudden transfer" of a lady teacher who was reportedly battling cancer.

title: Maharashtra government takes action against absentee doctors
content: Public Health and Family Welfare Minister Prakash Abitkar informed the Maharashtra Legislative Council that the government has initiated steps to improve transparency and efficiency in the health department

title: SSLC annual exam-1 begins across Karnataka, over 8.65 lakh students enrolled
content: As many as 4,44,172 boys and 4,21,816 girls from 15,941 high schools for the examination across the state.

title: Acid attack on minor in Maharashtra village; locals demand arrest of accused
content: According to police, the girl was heading home from the school in the afternoon when she was attacked. She is currently taking treatment at the hospital in Loni

title: Kerala Assembly polls: LDF ally RJD announces candidates; Bhaskaran, P.K. Praveen, and Anil Kumar to contest
content: Rashtriya Janata Dal to field M.K. Bhaskaran from Vadakara in Kozhikode, P.K. Praveen from Koothuparamba in Kannur, and P.K. Anil Kumar from Kalpetta in Wayanad as LDF candidates

title: Hyderabad sees intermittent showers after midnight rain, IMD forecasts more thundershowers
content: At 10.49 a.m., IMD issued an alert forecasting light to moderate thundershowers for the next few hours in the northern parts of the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation (GHMC).

title: Government mandates airlines to reserve 60% of seats free of charge
content: The Ministry, in its latest release, urges strict adherence to ‘passenger rights framework, particularly in cases of delays, cancellations and denied boarding’

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: PM Modi, LoP Kharge bid farewell to retiring Rajya Sabha MPs on completion of their terms
content: The Lok Sabha has taken up a discussion and voting on Agriculture and Family Welfare demands for grants

title: Watch: Why is Maharashtra’s Freedom of Religion Bill so controversial?
content: Maharashtra’s Freedom of Religion Bill, 2026 has sparked a major political and legal debate. The proposed law aims to prevent forced religious conversions through strict rules, including a 60-day prior notice and severe penalties. While the government says it protects vulnerable individuals, critics argue it could violate fundamental rights, enable misuse, and impact personal freedom and interfaith relationships. The bill has been passed in both houses.

title: Three MBBS students killed in scooter accident in Kerala’s Kozhikode
content: The accident took place around 2.30 a.m. when the electric scooter they were travelling on crashed into an electric post and fell into a drainage

title: Eight killed in Indore house fire after EV charging point blast; probe ordered
content: There was an explosion at the charging point, and the fire in the car then engulfed the house, says Police Commissioner Santosh Kumar Singh

title: LPG crunch pushes PM POSHAN kitchens back to firewood, burdening women workers
content: The PM POSHAN scheme which serves about 11 crore children across 10.35 lakh schools, mostly from socially disadvantaged and low-income backgrounds, is now reverting to alternative fuels

title: BJP-NCP candidates secure top posts in Latur Zilla Parishad
content: The Zilla Parishad elections were held on February 7 and appointment of the president concluded on March 16

title: A kidney sale that led to a CB-CID probe in Tamil Nadu
content: The nexus of agents with doctors and hospitals in the illegal sale of kidneys was exposed, the then Deputy Superintendent of Police V. Parthasarathy, who led the Organised Crime Unit of the CB-CID in investigating the case, wrote in a police journal published in 2010

content: Funded under the Special Grant Fund 2025-26, the boating facility will be built at a cost of ₹2.62 crore

content: In a similar incident, election officials seized ₹2.5 lakh from textile traders near Ambur town in Tirupattur when they stopped their vehicle on Chennai - Bengaluru Highway (NH 48)

content: The remarks assume significance in the wake of recent protests against the killing of Iran’s supreme leader Ali Khamenei in Kashmir and the detention of scores of protesters thereafter.

title: Sara Ali Khan can come to Kedarnath if she submits affidavit that she is Sanatani, says BKTC chief
content: Dwivedi’s response came during a press conference held in Dehradun where he shared the recent proposal passed by the temple committee which bars entry of ‘non-sanatani’ into Kedarnath and Badrinath shrines

title: PDP legislator Mehdi moves ‘Kashmiri Pandit and Migrant Reintegration Bill’ in J&K Assembly
content: Hundreds of Kashmiri Pandits left the Kashmir valley and settled in various parts of the country in the 1990s in the face of raging militancy

title: Centre and State government have failed to manage LPG shortage: NCP-SP leader Jayant Patil
content: LPG shortage has created a panic situation in Maharashtra with people queuing outside the distribution centres

title: Nitish Kumar kicks off fourth phase of Samriddhi Yatra in Bihar
content: On the first day, he visited Bhagalpur and Banka where he inaugurated and laid the foundation stone of 641 projects worth ₹1151 crore.

title: After Centre’s assurance on LPG supply, Bombay HC disposes of PIL
content: The petitioners had sought a direction to increase the supply of domestic LPG cylinders to meet the requirements of local consumers

title: Armed Forces Tribunal stays retirement of Colonel Purohit, acquitted in 2008 Malegaon blast case
content: Purohit had approached the tribunal seeking promotion to the ranks of Colonel and Brigadier, arguing that his career progression was stalled due to his arrest and prolonged trial in the Malegaon blast case

title: Assam MP Pradyut Bordoloi quits Congress
content: The trigger for Bordoloi was the alleged humiliation by State party president Gaurav Gogoi over the selection of candidate for the Laharighat Assembly constituency

title: MMA divisional rankings: Vallejos punches his ticket into featherweight top 10
content: the 24-year-old featherweight has fought four times in the 145-pound division . he has scored exhilarating knockouts in three of the wins . his latest was the first-round TKO of Josh Emmett .

title: Amid confusion over internal reservation, Karnataka SC/ST commission holds deliberations
content: Amid confusion over the internal reservation among Scheduled Castes, and reduction of overall reservation to Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes from 56% to 50% for recruitment to 56,432 posts, the Karnataka State Commission for Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes held deliberations with senior officials, former KPSC functionaries, and community representatives

title: PM Modi speaks to UAE President, agree on keeping Strait of Hormuz safe
content: Mr. Modi said he and the UAE President agreed on the importance of ensuring safe and free navigation through the Strait of Hormuz

title: Karnataka government plans new Excise Act to curb illegal sale of liquor
content: Excise Minister R.B. Thimmapur informed the Legislative Assembly that the government is considering revising the Karnataka Excise Act, 1965, and introducing a new law to curb the illegal sale of liquor

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Nemom constituency in for a tight and unpredictable contest
content: While LDF has announced incumbent MLA V. Sivankutty as its candidate, Rajeev Chandrasekhar will contest for NDA. UDF yet to propose its candidate. With BJP  again setting high hopes for constituency, LDF fighting hard to defend its turf and UDF yet to reveal its cards, an exciting contest is on the cards in Nemom

title: There are some problems in supply of certain drugs only at primary health centres: Karnataka Health Minister
content: Acknowledging that there were some problems related to the supply of certain medicines at primary health centres in the State, Health and Family Welfare Minister Dinesh Gundu Rao, however, told the Legislative Council that the drugs were not in short supply at State-run hospitals at the district and the taluk level

title: Over 200 signatories seek Rahul Gandhi’s apology for conduct within Parliament complex
content: The signatories allege that the Congress leader and other MPs organised a protest on the steps of Parliament despite the Speaker’s direction against any such demonstration within the premises

title: Redeployment of specialist doctors from CHCs to taluk hospitals done to reduce neonatal mortality, says Karnataka Health Minister
content: Health Minister Dinesh Gundu Rao has said that redeployment of gynaecologists and anaesthetists from community health centres in rural areas with lesser deliveries to taluk hospitals was done in an effort to reduce neonatal deaths after an audit of neonatal deaths in different areas of the State

title: Land acquisition notification ahead of polls keeps Sabari rail hopes alive
content: The notification, which mentions the survey numbers of land parcels to be acquired in Ernakulam, Kottayam and Idukki districts, was issued by the Revenue department on March 14, a day before the Assembly election was announced

title: Opposition’s protest against new rural jobs Act is a failure: Shivraj Singh Chouhan
content: Defending the VB-G RAM G Act, the Rural Development Minister says it is an upgraded framework for rural employment, and the new structure provided stronger safeguards for workers while improving productivity

title: Congress, Rahul Gandhi endorsing ‘anti-India’ report, claims BJP
content: The report by the U.S. Commission on International Religious Freedom (USCIRF) undermines India’s image as it sought sanctions on the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS) and the Research & Analysis Wing (RAW), says party spokesperson Sambit Patra

title: UGC-like funding mechanism to be adopted under Shiksha Adhishthan: Education Ministry
content: The VBSA Bill was intended to split grants-disbursal from regulation to avoid conflicts of interest; Opposition MPs on Joint Committee raise concerns about increasing centralisation, future funding of public universities

title: ₹60,000 crore subsidy, Amrit Bharat trains boost affordable rail travel: Vaishnaw
content: Railway Minister says at present, 133 Amrit Bharat trains are at various stages of manufacturing, with services already introduced in States such as West Bengal, Assam, Kerala and Tamil Nadu.

title: Why heirs of dead depositors can’t be told about unclaimed funds, SC asks govt.
content: The court was hearing a petition filed to ensure that information on money held by investors and depositors in dormant or inoperative accounts be made publicly available on a centralised platform

title: Day after NDA’s clean sweep in Bihar, Congress MLA says skipped RS poll on State party’s chief’s advice; Rajesh Ram denies claim
content: The Mahagathbandhan joint candidate, Amarendra Dhari Singh, lost the biennial election to the Upper House of Parliament after four MLAs from the Opposition alliance refrained from voting on March 16

title: NIA probes wider network after arrest of U.S., Ukrainian nationals
content: NIA examining digital footprints of accused; in social media post, accused U.S. citizen allegedly claims to run covert operations against authoritarian regimes; Ukraine Embassy seeks consular access to accused

title: India salutes maritime heroes for safeguarding critical energy supplies
content: Union Minister Sarbananda Sonowal commends the courage of Indian seafarers aboard LPG carriers Shivalik and Nanda Devi, which safely navigated the strategically sensitive Strait of Hormuz amid heightened regional tensions

title: Union Govt writes to States, UTs for speedily approving pending, new gas pipeline projects
content: This forms part of the government’s objective to push for piped natural gas as it seeks to ease pressure on LPG

title: Tamil Nadu’s mental health policy for educational institutions spells out preventive measures
content: The policy, issued earlier this month, provides for mental health and counselling services, data-driven action, and a framework table for suicide prevention among students

title: JD(U) leader K.C. Tyagi quits party
content: The former Rajya Sabha member says ideological commitments remain unchanged; likely to join another party active in Uttar Pradesh

title: Assam’s dramatis personae: Himanta, Gaurav, ‘Miyas’ and also development
content: The BJP’s pet narrative of protecting Assam from the ‘infiltrators’, and the personal rivalry between Himanta Biswa Sarma and Gaurav Gogoi are likely to dominate Assam’s first single-phase Assembly polls in 25 years

title: MDMK calls for total prohibition and life imprisonment for sexual offenders
content: In its manifesto released on Tuesday (March 17, 2026) by party general secretary Vaiko, the MDMK said Tamil Nadu should be free from liquor and other drugs which are ‘responsible for the degeneration of youth’

title: March taken out to Lok Bhavan in protest against Bill on transgender persons
content: Copies of the Bill burnt as members of transgender, intersex, and gender diverse community demand its withdrawal; they allege that it takes away the right to gender self-determination and violates human and constitutional rights

title: Majority of employment creation in agriculture, says report
content: The country is nearing the peak of its demographic dividend, with the share of the working age population expected to begin declining after 2030, says the report

title: Government plans natural farming in over 61,000 acres from kharif
content: Natural farming would be implemented in 489 clusters with a cost of ₹42 crore and the farmers selected for the mission would be first trained at some identified Rythu Vedikas

title: SEC pushes for live webcasting from all polling booths during GBA polls to ensure transparency
content: G.S. Sangreshi said that while the Finance Department has agreed to webcast from only a limited number of booths, he would write again seeking approval for all

title: Tiger ‘Explorer’ walks back to Papikonda National Park
content: It was inching closer to Yeleru reservoir from the Pampa reservoir through dense forest cover in the Kakinada district by Tuesday night.

title: Karnataka High Court refuses to quash rape case against government school teacher for repeated abuse and blackmail of colleague
content: The allegations made in the complaint and the charge-sheet depict “not consent but submission extracted under duress” and that the petitioner must face a full-fledged trial, said Justice M. Nagaprasanna

title: Switching to electric power has saved Railways ₹6,000 crore: Vaishnaw in Lok Sabha
content: Responding to a debate on demands for grants of the Railway Ministry, he also said that the national transporter has become the second largest cargo carrier in the world.

title: Week 5: Top 25 rankings, top moments and what to watch
content: the SEC got off to a fast and hot start, with Arkansas taking its home series against Mississippi State in Fayetteville and Texas finally losing its first game of the season . the Tigers dropped two games on the road to Vanderbilt . this week's biggest riser is crosstown rival USC, which rose up 12 spots .

title: Will Ferrell named as a Los Angeles World Cup host ambassador
content: the 2026 world cup community in los Angeles will be in good hands courtesy of the newest host ambassadors . will Ferrell will join 1999 women's world cup champions Julie Foudy . the host committee announced that he will be the community ambassador for the event .

title: Women's tournament odds: UConn odds-on favorite; UCLA, Texas, South Carolina next
content: the shortest odds for a pre-tournament favorite since 2018 was also the last time UConn was favored going into the Big Dance . the SEC dominates the next four spots between Texas (+700), south Carolina (+800), LSU (16-1, opened 14-1) and Vanderbilt (50-1)

title: Women's March Madness 2026 bracket: First look at all 68 teams
content: sixty-eight teams will compete in the 2026 women's NCAA tournament . the bracket revealed which teams are in, which bubble teams got left out and which matchups might be waiting on the road to Phoenix, where the national champion will be crowned on April 5 .

title: WBC champs! Takeaways as Venezuela stuns Team USA
content: Venezuela clinches its first WBC title with a 3-2 victory over team USA . despite a clutch two-run homer by Bryce Harper tied the score in the eighth inning, Team USA couldn't hold on . here are our takeaways from the conclusion to yet another exciting tournament .

title: Jay Bilas predicts every game of the 2026 men's NCAA tournament
content: the 2026 men's NCAA tournament is revealed in a bracket . the bracket gives us less than five minutes . my bracket was chalky last season, but the backlash was swift and unrelenting . I was criticized for not picking an underdog to reach Sao Paulo .

title: Matt Leinart on unretiring USC No. 11: 'Not for sale'
content: former quarterback's no. 11 jersey has been retired for over two decades . leinart says there have been "multiple times" people have asked him to unretire it for a prospect . he said he would do it only for his son, Cole, who committed to SMU in November 2024 .

title: Real Madrid deal latest blow to Guardiola's Champions League legacy
content: real madrid beat manchester city 2-1 to reach the quarterfinals of the champions league . a 5-1 aggregate win at the Etihad stadium sealed a 2-1 aggregate win for real . city are likely to face Bayern Munich in the last-16 first leg .
